column1: Hey Alyson, thanks for your interest in rolling with us at SpringBreak U. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text you in a few to get you squared away with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy from SpringBreak U here
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options and deets
My bad I missed your response somehow!
I got you tho, which destination were you lookin to book?
dope yeaa thats where I'll be too actually. how many ppl in your group so far?
thats solid fs! you all from the same school? ill hook it up with a good group rate
word all good I got you anyway. which school most of you from?
oh bet yea we're based out of mass too, up in middleton tho. kinda deep lol
umass knows how to party tho fs
gonna put this info together for you rn, how soon were you lookin to get started?
oh yes we do, we were definitely planning to have it started soon so we can get hyped and ready
is it cool if I send most of the info through email? its a little long for text
yes that's totally fine my email is acm4226@gmail.com
sent that over, did it come through?
yes! we're setting up our group chat and seeing what option
bet! I can hook it up with a discount on some of the prices you see there too just lmk which one we wanna narrow down on. I'll personally be on the occidental punta cana package your week
I can also help you find a good flight to grab on the side to save money
oh that would be perfect we definitely want to do occidental
okay cool. let the squad know I'll hook it up for $749 on the 5 night, and $599 on the 4 night if we're looking to start reserving things this weekend
reservation starts with a deposit, then you get through the end of this year to pay things off. spreads it out a little so you dont have to pay it off at once
cool yea if they have any questions I'm here just shoot me a text
we wanna do the 5 nights let me know if i need to email you
Okay cool, I'll make the reservation for you. Still 10 ppl?
Dope lets do it. were y'all ready to reserve today?
yes i can try to make it happen today
got you, I'll work on it rn
I emailed over the reservation, here it is too https://secure.springbreaku.com/site/public/package/JOZ6WATJDI
yea, lmk if anyone has any questions! the email has a step by step breakdown on how to navigate through
perfect i sent it to the group so we can figure out rooms and make the reservation
sounds good. theres two rooms of 3, and one room of 4 to make it 10 ppl even. I can move around slots afterward too if need be. like if someone wants to swap rooms with another person
if one person can't go anymore so it would be 9 would that change the price for us or should we find a different person?
yea we'd make that 3rd room a room of 3. price would go up by like $12 a person. nothing too crazy
hey checkin in! how we lookin, we got 8 ppl so far on the reservation
yes two had to drop out so we got another two and we're working out the details with them before they make the deposit
Got you. Yea keep me posted
Aly any word with those other two that maybe hopping in?
yes they're paying this week so their parents can help with the deposit
okay bet. they able to hop on the link and enter their names in / create their accounts?
oh yeah i can have them do that
perfect. that way I can put a note in to the operations team so they know whats up
perfect sounds good i let them know
accounts are all set for rooms we just wanted to switch nathan and nicolai if possible
okay cool yup Nathan and Nicolai are officially switched
and the what day can Sara and Nicholas make their payments so that I can let operations team know
perfect and they said by saturday at the latest
do we have to wait until all payments are in to book plane tickets some people were looking to get them booked soon
Nahh I would book those asap tbh
You can enter the flight info into your accounts once you get it
ok is there any group rates or are we better off just ordering those on our own
Better off on your own. youll save money that way. I can help you find a good one tho
which airport we wanna fly out of
Here's the best I found out of BDL,Jet Blue https://www.google.com/travel/flights/s/Vr44k1zP9MJnkfNg8
hey Alyson whats up, Nathan is running behind on his payment, do you know if he still plans on going?
oh yes i can remind him
hey hey, are Nicolai or Nicola on the same flight as anyone else in the group?
they're both on sara and nick paul's flight
did y'all want to add any party pass event tickets? you have the booze cruise locked in
ok do all of us have the booze cruise cause they're people who don't are willing to pay so if we got that we're good
hey safe travels today. see y'all soon!
its been soo lit here. y'all are gonna love it lol
